title: Determine the exact value of R(K2,5, K3,5)
micro_paper_assessment: Exact closure remains micro-paper eligible, but the current solve only produced a structural slice and is not yet paper-shaped on its own.
family_affinity: Strong fit with one-step mixed complete-bipartite Ramsey gaps, especially the R(K2,t, K3,s) corridor.
generalization_signal: Pair/triple common-neighborhood counting and the one-vertex extension lemma should transfer to nearby one-step mixed bipartite gaps, but the final obstruction is still witness-specific.
candidate_theorem_slice: Any 22-vertex coloring avoiding red K2,5 and blue K3,5 has red edge count between 89 and 106; for every vertex v, the red graph on N_R(v) has maximum degree at most 4 and the blue graph on N_B(v) is K2,5-free.
next_action: Obtain the concrete 21-vertex lower-bound witness and test the admissible one-vertex extension conditions; absent that, sharpen the local obstruction analytically rather than launching blind graph search.
